text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I lost again?! How? I thought I would<n>win for sure
this time!
choice_data_list: No need to panic. Let's take this slowly.
This is no time to be sad!
This is no time to be sad!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I lost again?! How? I thought I would<n>win for sure
this time!
choice_data_list: No need to panic. Let's take this slowly.
This is no time to be sad!
This is no time to be sad!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on! Are you serious?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I just sit back and smell the roses,<n>I'm gonna
be left in the dust!
choice_data_list:
There are some things you can only see when
you're calm.

There are some things you can only see when
you're calm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hnngh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Leave me alone! Just go away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems my attempt at<n>encouragement has the
reverse<n>effect on Narita Taishin's mood, and<n>she
kicks me out without a second<n>thought.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I realize that telling her to calm down<n>without
considering her feelings might<n>have been rather
insensitive—so I<n>wait for her, intending to
apologize.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What are you doing here?
choice_data_list:
I wanted to apologize for what I said in the waiting
room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You've been standing here this<n>whole time just
for that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh. I don't even know what to say.<n>You're so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Never mind. Anyway, now that I've<n>calmed down
a bit...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You were right. I was able to see<n>what was
wrong. I still have a long<n>ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure. What are we still standing<n>here and
talking for, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Let's go to your office and figure out<n>how to get
me first place!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She grins fiercely, eyes blazing, and I<n>recognize it
as the flames of her<n>determination to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up! I'm not sad!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm just mad at myself for being so<n>pathetic!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What are you on about?
choice_data_list: We can start the hard-core training tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tomorrow?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna put this off till<n>tomorrow? We should
be starting<n>right now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You want me to train hard-core? Bring<n>it on. I'll get
super strong and grab<n>first place next time!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She vows to make a comeback, and<n>we begin our
days of hard-core<n>training.
